rationale: The supplied Nutrition brief is a coherent existing plan with an observable full-outcome oracle. It is approved for continuous execution, but implementation scope must follow an initial read-only repository map. Required boundaries are architecture, migration and historical integrity, sensitive authorization/privacy, cross-feature allocation and consumption correctness, accessible UX/data quality, and final acceptance. A standalone calorie page, mutable history, broad household visibility, equal-serving assumptions, or treating planned/Pantry food as consumed cannot satisfy the outcome. The active Pantry board is intent, not implementation evidence.

parallel_safety.rationale: The next package is one read-only architecture map; write scopes and Pantry implementation state are not yet known.

missing_evidence: Repository architecture and baseline gate map
Implementation, migration, authorization, rendered workflow, historical-integrity, and full-oracle verification evidence
required_board_updates: Mark T001 done with this receipt and note.
Activate T002 exactly as the queued read-only repository mapping package.
Keep T003 as the architecture-boundary Judge and do not populate T004 allowed_files until T003 approves a Worker package.
